name_en: /22 Autumn/Winter New AS2844 Hippie Bag is also so fragrant, minimalist design, full of details. Overall curved shape, wide shoulder strap, two black badges on each side, quite a vintage feel. The opening design is more convenient than a zipper. No decoration on the back, very simple. Front paired with a gold chain black gold is an eternal classic! Can be elegant and generous, or cool and cool, no conflict at all. Dimensions: 29*28*7cm
